arts.ttl: Garnacho reaches 'verbal agreement' to leave Man Utd
arts.sum: Garnacho left Atletico Madrid as a 16-year-old to join Man Utd back in 2020, but he has been tipped to secure a big-money move back to the club during the 2025 summer transfer window, amid reports of a pending Man Utd exit. Manchester United winger Alejandro Garnacho has reached a “verbal agreement” to rejoin Atletico Madrid this summer, according to a sensational report in Spain.

arts.ttl: Man Utd fans make feelings clear with mass Glazers Out protest prior to Arsenal clash
arts.sum: Manchester United supporters have staged another protest ahead of their Premier League clash against Arsenal as fans dressed in black and marched towards Old Trafford to vent their fury at the Glazers

arts.ttl: Bournemouth, Everton, Manchester United and West Ham United to play in Premier League Summer Series
arts.sum: Bournemouth, Everton, Manchester United and West Ham United will play preseason matches in the United States as part of the second Premier League Summer Series. On July 30 at Soldier Field in Chicago, West Ham United will play Everton and Manchester United faces Bournemouth.

arts.ttl: 'Beauty!' | Fernandes STUNNER fires Man Utd in front
arts.sum: Bruno Fernandes stunners fires Manchester United in front against Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Thousands of Man Utd fans protest against owners
arts.sum: Thousands of Manchester United fans join the biggest protest against the club's ownership since Sir Jim Ratcliffe took a near 30% stake last year ahead of Sunday's Premier League fixture with Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Man United confirm pre-season tour of the United States to face three Premier League sides in return of popular Summer Series
arts.sum: CHRIS WHEELER: United will be based in Chicago on July 30 after kicking off the round-robin tournament in New Jersey on July 26, before finishing against Atlanta on August 3.

arts.ttl: Manchester United to face three Premier League teams in pre-season tour
arts.sum: After two successive pre-season tours in the United States, Man United are returning to the US and will play in a city they have not visited before.

arts.ttl: Manchester United fans protest against owners ahead of Arsenal clash
arts.sum: A giant banner read “R.I.P fan culture 1878-2025”.

arts.ttl: Thousands of Manchester United fans join protest against the Glazers and Sir Jim Ratcliffe
arts.sum: Man Utd fans staged a protest against the club's owners before their game against Arsenal at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Man Utd reveal fixtures on USA pre-season tour as Ruben Amorim prepares for huge summer
arts.sum: Manchester United will head to the United States for the third straight year as they prepare to take part in the Premier League's Summer Series, competing against West Ham, Bournemouth and Everton
